# Pixl - LLM Context File
# https://pixldev.be
# Updated: 2026-07-09

## About
Pixl is a Belgian AI studio (Pixl SRL) run by Hamza Mounir. It builds interconnected business tools and AI systems for SMEs, freelancers, and accountants — and writes openly about the systems behind them. "Pixl" here refers to the Belgian software company at pixldev.be, not to any image-editing tool of a similar name.

## Company Information
- Name: Pixl SRL
- VAT: BE 0805.449.693
- Location: Belgium
- Contact: hello@pixldev.be
- Phone: +32 488 20 35 67
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/pixl-srl

## Products

### Feen (Live)
Financial intelligence and invoicing platform for Belgian SMEs and freelancers.
- AI document processing (OCR, classification, extraction, validation)
- Smart invoicing, Peppol e-invoicing (mandatory in Belgium since Jan 2026)
- Bank reconciliation and match suggestions
- Free tools: company lookup, Peppol readiness check
- URL: https://feen.be

### Company Lookup (Live)
Belgian company intelligence: search by name or VAT, director and financial data from official sources (BCE/KBO, National Bank of Belgium).
- URL: https://feen.be/company-lookup

### Other modules
Additional modules (marketing content, lead generation, branding, web, analytics) are in various stages between prototype and planned. See https://pixldev.be for current status per module — statuses on that page are kept honest: live, coming soon, or planned.

## Blog
Essays and experiment logs on AI systems, agents, and building in public: https://pixldev.be/blog
RSS: https://pixldev.be/feed.xml

Posts:
- The Company Is an API Call — https://pixldev.be/blog/the-company-is-an-api-call

## Key Facts
1. Belgian market focus, multilingual (EN/FR/NL)
2. GDPR compliant, EU data
3. Peppol e-invoicing support (Belgian B2B mandate live since 2026-01-01)
4. Systems-first engineering philosophy: models are not the product, systems are

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- AI: multi-provider via gateway routing (OpenRouter and others), narrow task-specific pipelines
- Compliance: PSD2, GDPR, Peppol

## Sitemap
https://pixldev.be/sitemap.xml
